form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr6) over 2260m at Bathurst, at the bell was 7th-13.5 beaten 10 m by In Lexys Words (2:45.70) in NR up to 52 on April 1 at $101. Before that, 4th (Sr4) over 1720m at Young was 2nd-2.6 at the bell, beaten 5.5 m by Maggie Moth (2:07.20) in 0-1 WIN on March 24 at $41. Can do a lot better in this suitable contest.
